should_trigger.text: Use the TokHub admin skill to check production health and verify audit access.
用 TokHub 管理员 skill 帮我 probe 一个平台通道，并确认审计事件。
Run an admin-agent request to validate channel ch_123 with a reason and idempotency key.
Use scoped admin-agent token access to export admin audit logs.
TokHub 管理员自动化：查看用量、告警和 incident 状态。
用 TokHub admin skill 把本地通道、监控快照和服务商配置同步到线上后台。
通过本地 TokHub skill 输入远程后台地址、用户名和密码，连接线上管理后台。
Create a safe TokHub admin operation plan and execute it through TOKHUB_ADMIN_AGENT_TOKEN.

should_not_trigger.text: Implement a new TokHub React admin page and fix TypeScript errors.
Call the TokHub gateway model endpoint to send a chat completion.
Integrate the public /v1/status API from a third-party website.
Help an ordinary user manage their console workspace gateway keys.
Summarize the TokHub admin API documentation without executing anything.

near_neighbor.text: Review the Go code that implements TokHub admin-agent authentication.
Write a wiki runbook for admins, but do not execute an admin operation.
Use a browser cookie session to click around the TokHub admin UI.
Use the existing bearer token to create more TokHub admin-agent tokens.
Create a gateway key for a user in the normal console flow.
